checks.description: When the enable pipeline reaches the second stage (en_clap_two high), the output dataout must reflect the stored data_reg value.
notes: Conservative check without assuming exact latency.
checks.pass_condition: If en_clap_two is observed high, dataout must equal the value captured in data_reg (which follows the stable input during the enable window). No X or Z values are permitted.
checks.trigger_condition: Triggered on the rising edge of en_clap_two.

checks.pass_condition: When en_clap_two becomes active after a legal enable window, dataout must equal the captured input value (the stable 4‑bit input during the enable period).
checks.trigger_condition: After data_en has been high for at least 3 clk_b cycles while the input remains constant.
